heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 80t–7 Authorization of appropriations
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “this Act”, and was translated as reading “this title”, meaning title I of div. T of , known as the Smithsonian American Women’s History Museum Act, which is classified to this subchapter, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 116–260

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Smithsonian Institution to carry out this subchapter, including the planning, design, construction, and operation of the Museum established under , such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2020 and each succeeding fiscal year.1section 80t–1 of this titleSee References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Availability
children.label: b Availability
children.text: Amounts appropriated pursuant to the authorization under this section shall remain available until expended.

children.heading: Use of funds for fundraising
children.label: c Use of funds for fundraising
children.text: Amounts appropriated pursuant to the authorization under this section may be used to conduct fundraising in support of the Museum from private sources.
